positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a group of friendly, bioluminescent deep-sea creatures (anglerfish, jellyfish, seahorses) floating through a cosmic, glowing ocean abyss. Vibrant neon colors, detailed linework, vaporwave aesthetic, digital painting, high contrast.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, realism, photorealistic
